raw_consumer_statement: I Purchased a purse from XXXX on my barclays XXXX card. this item was not what I expected so it was returned and the company claims they recieved a empty box. I had no idea I needed how that happen when i dropped the item off at the drop off station it was weighed and sealed I have proof of that and the company keeps denieing my dispute.The item was XXXX. I am out of the money on something that i never even got to use this is very upsetting. I have proof it was dropped off and weighed but the company shows the box empty this is very upsetting and I can belive something can not be done.The company and barclays refused a refund XXXX refund denied again. Im told i should of took a picture of the item before i sent it how am i supposed to know this would happen.
